programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Best friends and single moms Karen and Sarah are searching for a new home to purchase together.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Ross and Linda are upsizing their lakefront home to better entertain their growing family; touring properties with acres of land, stunning log construction, and impressive water frontage, they're searching for the perfect backdrop for memory-making.
